creator: freebsdports@chillibear.com
text:
A simple rubygem port

This is a pretty mixed library of Ruby extensions.  I've ported it primarily because the author uses it in several of his other Ruby Gems, ports of which I maintain.  So it's required for me to upgrade those.

The actual library routines can be seen here:

http://github.com/flori/spruz/tree/master/lib/spruz/

How-To-Repeat: n/a
